articles.title: Nissan India Posts 75% YoY Growth, But Sales Stand At Only 3,203 Units
articles.description: Nissan India reports total sales of 5,388 units in April 2026, with a 75% YoY growth domestically with 3,203 units, while exports reach 2,185 units.

articles.title: India’s first barrier-less toll system launched on NH-48 in Gujarat; here's what it means for commuters
articles.description: India's first barrier-less toll system is now operational at Gujarat's Chorayasi Toll Plaza, thanks to Union Minister Nitin Gadkari's announcement. This Multi-Lane Free Flow system uses ANPR and FASTag, allowing vehicles to pass without stopping. The initiative aims to ease traffic, save time and fuel, and reduce emissions, reflecting the government's commitment to modern, efficient highways.

articles.title: Meta sees massive drop in active users across Facebook, Instagram and WhatsApp; here's why
articles.description: Meta reports a decline in users across Facebook and Instagram as concerns around feed quality, ads, and repetitive content increase, prompting platform-level changes to algorithms and recommendations.

articles.title: GoBoult Mustang Muscle review: A style-first smartwatch that gets most things right
articles.description: A design-first smartwatch with a racer’s soul, the GoBoult Mustang Muscle blends bold aesthetics with practical features, though it leaves a little room for refinement. At Rs 2,999, it sports a big display, powerful performance and great looks. But, is it worth it?

articles.title: Apple accidentally ships Claude instruction files in Apple Support app update; here's what it means for users
articles.description: Apple Support app update reportedly included internal Claude instruction files, suggesting a packaging oversight. The files indicate Apple may be using Anthropic’s AI internally for development and support workflows.

articles.title: Samsung Galaxy A54 receives One UI 8.5 Beta 2 update
articles.description: A few days ago, Samsung released the One UI 8.5 Beta 2 update for the Galaxy S23 series, Galaxy Z Flip5, Galaxy A36, and Galaxy A35. Now, the brand has expanded the rollout of the second One UI 8.5 beta to the Galaxy A54. The One UI 8.5 Beta 2 update for the Galaxy A54 comes with firmware version A546EXXUJZZD9 and requires a download of about 500MB. You can check the One UI 8.5 Beta 2 update's changelog below for more details: Fixed an issue where Bluetooth auto scan does not work when entering Bluetooth settings. Camera function stabilization. Fixed an issue where...

articles.description: Mahindra posts 94,627 April sales, up 14% YoY; SUVs grow 8% to 56,331 units, while exports rise 47% amid strong overall demand.

articles.description: Google Photos wardrobe feature: The feature scans your Google Photos, finds clothes you wore, and organises them into a simple collection to view past outfits easily.

As Mercury enters Taurus, three zodiac signs Taurus, Virgo, and Capricorn, step into a powerful growth phase. This period supports financial stability, career breakthroughs, and rapid progress. articles.title: HAL Chairman & Managing Director D K Sunil steps down
articles.description: Hindustan Aeronautics Ltd. announced that Dr. D K Sunil has stepped down as Chairman and Managing Director upon his superannuation on April 30, 2026. He had assumed these leadership roles in September 2024. The company made this announcement through a regulatory filing on Friday.

articles.title: Virgo Horoscope Today, May 1, 2026: Major Breakthroughs Begin After an Unexpected Efficiency Breakdown
articles.description: Virgo, today’s shift into Magha Nakshatra brings a more subtle but powerful activation of your inner authority, subconscious strength, and karmic patterns. Unlike the visible leadership energy others may experience, for you this day works behind the scenes, strengthening your inner foundation and preparing you for future authority. Let’s find out what astrologer Sandeep Agarwal predicts in this virgo horoscope today, where reflection, preparation, and emotional clarity become key themes through your virgo daily horoscope.

articles.title: US Probes Airbnb, Anysphere's Use of Chinese AI Models Over Security
articles.description: US House committees on China and Homeland Security are probing security risks from Chinese AI models used by companies like Airbnb. The investigation cites threats to US data and critical infrastructure from CCP-aligned technology.

articles.title: New LPG Rules Explained: OTP Delivery, Price Changes, and Dual Gas Ban
articles.description: Effective May 1, 2026, the Ministry of Petroleum and Natural Gas has rolled out new LPG regulations. Key changes include banning dual LPG and PNG connections, mandating OTP-based delivery, and a significant price increase for commercial cylinders.

articles.title: Reliable connectivity, shorter journey: Promises of first direct Jammu-Srinagar train
articles.description: The extended train will depart from Jammu Tawi railway station 6.20 am and reach Srinagar at 11.10 am, covering a distance of around 266 km.

articles.title: Best of Both Sides | AI governance needs better implementation, not more regulation
articles.description: What matters is not necessarily the number of weaknesses in a system, but which of those weaknesses can be exploited before they are fixed. This requires a departure from traditional cybersecurity approaches.

articles.title: Best of Both Sides | iMessage from Claude Mythos: It’s too late for regulation, AI needs slowing down
articles.description: Regulation and oversight are of little use if they are always playing a chasing game. AI companies have turned regulation into the last line of redress when it should have been the first line of defence.

articles.title: May 2026: Top smartphones launching this month
articles.description: May 2026 Gadget Launches: Discover Vivo X300 Ultra, Oppo Find X9 Ultra, and OnePlus Nord CE6. Packed with top-tier cameras and processors, these devices promise exceptional performance in diverse price bands. Stay tuned for detailed reviews and specifications.

articles.title: Mphasis Q4 net profit rises 14% to Rs 510 crore
articles.description: Mphasis has taken the spotlight with stellar financial results for the fourth quarter of fiscal year 2026, celebrating a solid 14.1 percent boost in net profit year-on-year. The company’s revenue also saw a healthy climb, up 14.4 percent over the same period. This impressive growth is largely attributed to innovative contracts won through their AI-driven initiatives.

articles.title: Tech Mahindra to buy 85% in Canada’s Avant Techno Solutions
articles.description: Tech Mahindra is acquiring an 85% stake in Canadian wealth management firm Avant Techno Solutions for CAD 28 million. This strategic move aims to bolster Tech Mahindra's BFSI sector capabilities, particularly in payments modernization and wealth platforms. The acquisition is expected to be finalized by July 31, enhancing the company's service offerings for financial institutions navigating digital transformation.

articles.title: IT cuts mid-tier, expands AI-smart entry level in new hiring playbook
articles.description: India's top IT companies are changing how they hire. They are bringing in more fresh graduates and giving them AI tools. Middle managers are being reduced. This move aims to control costs and improve efficiency. Companies are focusing on productivity growth. Revenue per employee is increasing. This strategy is shaping the future of the IT sector.

articles.title: Calligo in talks to raise $12-15 million to scale indigenous RISC-V chip play
articles.description: Bengaluru's Calligo Technologies is in talks to secure $12-15 million in funding. US-based BIG Capital is expected to lead the investment round. This funding will help Calligo commercially scale its silicon chip and expand globally. The company focuses on energy-efficient computing for AI and supercomputing applications. This move signals growing investor interest in India's semiconductor sector.

articles.title: National Health Innovation Summit: Nadda, Saini highlight digital push for accessible healthcare
articles.description: The summit serves as a premier platform for States and Union Territories to showcase path-breaking innovations and best practices in the health sector, with a focus on advancing inclusive, accessible, and affordable healthcare across the country.

articles.title: AirPods Ultra are coming with cameras for Siri
articles.description: Apple is rumored to be getting really serious about Ultra branding in the coming months, with the iPhone Fold expected to actually be launched as the iPhone Ultra. There will also be a MacBook Ultra, and a new pair of AirPods Ultra. These will basically be the AirPods Pro 3, but with added cameras. The cameras will be used by Siri - that is, the new, revamped, AI-ified Siri powered by Gemini, which is (hopefully) finally coming in iOS 27 later this year. The AirPods Ultra have been rumored before, and presumably those cameras will be there so you can ask Siri about what you're...

articles.title: China demand hinges on good products that resonate with customers, Cook says
articles.description: Apple had a record-breaking March quarter partially thanks to excellent performance in China, but there's more to the story than just basic demand. iPhone 17e helped drive demand in Q2 The US government went through a period of upheaval in 2025 thanks to the new administration's aggressive, random, and now illegal tariffs. While not much has improved in that regard, the relationship between the US and China has improved somewhat in the intervening year. According to Apple CEO Tim Cook on CNBC , that improved relationship with China was a positive development, but not the drive. He claims it is that "the product has really resonated with the customer." Continue Reading on AppleInsider | Discuss on our Forums

articles.title: Kailash Manasarovar Yatra 2024: MEA opens applications for 2 routes
articles.description: The MEA announced the Kailash Manasarovar Yatra will be held from June to August via Lipulekh Pass and Nathu La. The fully digital registration process is open online until May 19, with selection done via a computer-generated random process.

articles.title: Record quarter leads to new $100B share buyback, increased dividend
articles.description: Apple reported $111.2 billion in revenue for its fiscal second quarter on April 30, and with it a new $100 billion share buyback, and $0.27 per share dividend. Apple posts its latest earnings results Results for the quarter ended March 28, 2026, beat expectations, with earnings per share of $2.01, up 22% year over year. The company posted growth across every geographic segment, with iPhone revenue setting a March-quarter record on demand for the iPhone 17 lineup, while Services reached a new all-time high. Apple also generated more than $28 billion in operating cash flow during the quarter. Earnings grew faster than revenue, showing Apple's cost structure held as the business expanded. Continue Reading on AppleInsider | Discuss on our Forums

articles.title: JuliaHub raises $65mn, launches AI platform for industrial design
articles.description: Bengaluru-based JuliaHub secured $65 million in funding. The company also launched Dyad 3.0, its updated AI platform. Dyad brings agentic AI to hardware engineering. It designs, simulates, and optimizes complex industrial systems. This platform aims to significantly reduce development timelines. Engineers can now develop systems faster than ever before.

articles.title: Psychology Says Only 2 Types of People Will Thrive in the AI Era. Are You One of Them?
articles.description: AI is reshaping work, rewarding hands-on experts and unconventional thinkers, while reducing demand for routine roles—shifting value toward physical skills, originality, and the ability to adapt beyond predictable, repeatable tasks.

articles.title: Self-enumeration for census in Meghalaya starts today
articles.description: Today marks a groundbreaking moment for Meghalaya as it launches India’s pioneering fully digital Census 2027. Residents can conveniently participate by completing their self-enumeration online until May 15. This innovative approach leverages mobile applications and a specialized portal to enhance data accuracy, supported by 9,000 enumerators and supervisors.

articles.title: Dreame talks about its smartphones again without revealing any specs
articles.description: As Dreame is headed towards an IPO, most likely in the US, aiming to raise tons of money, the company has recently 'diversified' its range of products to make itself more interesting to investors. We say 'diversified' quote-unquote because vaguely talking about things doesn't really count as launching them. Case in point: the smartphones. These were first talked about in China in February, then the company upped the ante by talking about gold phones in March. It's already the end of April and no specs have been revealed for any of them, but you'll be happy to hear that Dreame has once...
